escalation.rationale: Multiple escalatory developments including Israeli expansion into Lebanon north of Litani River, near-total Strait of Hormuz closure, US threats against Oman, and ongoing US-Iran war entering day 91.

ticker_items: Israeli troops advance north of Litani River in Lebanon
US-Iran near 60-day deal to reopen Hormuz Strait
Trump threatens to 'blow up' Oman amid Iran tensions
Netanyahu orders seizure of 70% of Gaza territory
Drone strike hits Romania, injuring two civilians

eastern_europe.description: Russian drone crashed into apartment building causing explosion and fire.
Drone struck residential building injuring two people

middle_east.description: Hezbollah drone strike killed at least one Israeli soldier.
Drone strike killed one Israeli soldier and injured two others

claimed_totals.claim: Children killed in Lebanon since ceasefire

russia.text: Russia has all the means to destroy anyone who attempts to destroy its air defense bases
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

middle_east.text: directed Israel's military to take more of Gaza, initially by seizing 70 per cent of the Palestinian territory
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

observers.description: NATO member Romania directly struck by Russian drone during Ukraine attack. Two F-16 fighters scrambled to track border incursions. Government accuses Russia of escalation.
Germany and Netherlands establishing NATO command center in Baltics. Defense funding gap discussions ongoing with allies concerned about NATO summit preparations.
Military modernization topping Asia defense summit concerns. Analysts report continued support for Russia despite Western sanctions. President Xi reportedly planning North Korea state visit.

Government divided on sanctioning Russian-owned Aughinish Alumina refinery. Taoiseach argues sanctions would harm EU more than Russia, while Tánaiste insists Ireland cannot cherrypick companies based on domestic costs.

New Prime Minister Peter Magyar maintains predecessor Orban's stance, ruling out sending weapons to Ukraine after talks with NATO chief Mark Rutte, signaling policy continuity despite leadership change.

financial.notes: Global oil reserves depleting at record pace due to near-total Strait of Hormuz closure according to major economic organizations.

update_log.text: US Treasury threatens Oman with sanctions day after Trump threatens military action
Netanyahu orders Israeli military to seize 70% of Gaza territory
Israeli troops confirmed moving north of Lebanon's Litani River despite ceasefire
US and Iran near 60-day deal to reopen Hormuz Strait on war day 91
Drone strike in Romanian city of Galați injures two civilians
Russian drone strikes Romanian apartment building near Ukraine border
Netanyahu orders Israeli military to seize control of 70% of Gaza Strip
Israel expands Lebanon evacuation orders to 14% of country including Tyre
US-Iran tentative 60-day ceasefire agreement awaiting Trump approval
